hero.subtitle: Free subdomains for AI projects. No DNS config, no waiting.
hero.tagline: Just like is-a.dev, but for AI stuff.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: Three simple steps to get your AI project online with a professional subdomain
howItWorks.step1Desc: Pick any available name for your AI project
howItWorks.step1Details: Type your desired subdomain and check availability instantly
howItWorks.step2Desc: Enter your domain, IP, or hosting platform
howItWorks.step2Details: Works with Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages, and more
howItWorks.step3Desc: DNS propagates within minutes, SSL included
howItWorks.step3Details: Automatic HTTPS, global CDN, and instant activation

community.title: Open source project
community.description: Contribute code, report bugs, or request features on GitHub.

checker.title: Check Subdomain Availability
checker.description: Enter your desired subdomain to check if it's available
checker.signInPrompt: Sign in to register your subdomain

createModal.title: Create Subdomain
createModal.vendorDesc: Only TXT records are allowed for vendor verification subdomains. You must own the base subdomain to create this record.
createModal.validationTitle: Please fix the following DNS record errors:

editModal.title: Edit Subdomain
editModal.cannotChange: Subdomain name cannot be changed after creation
editModal.vendorDesc: Only TXT records are allowed for vendor verification subdomains.
editModal.validationTitle: Please fix the following DNS record errors:

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.manageSubdomainsLegacy: Manage your is-an.ai subdomains ({{count}} total, limit: {{max}} for new accounts)
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete <mono>{{name}}{{domain}}</mono>? This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.legacyDesc: You have {{count}} subdomains from before our limit change. You can keep all existing subdomains, but new registrations are limited to {{max}} total. Delete some subdomains to create new ones.
dashboard.limitReached: You have reached the maximum limit of {{max}} subdomains per account. Delete an existing subdomain to create a new one.
dashboard.registrarUnavailable: New registrations are temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

serviceBanner.title: Migration complete!
serviceBanner.message: We've moved from Cloudflare (3,500 capacity) to dns.he.net (10,000 capacity). New subdomain registrations are now open again.

platformGuide.dnsPropagation: DNS propagation takes 5-10 minutes. Please wait a moment after setting up the domain in {{platform}}.
